title: glandularia catharinae
intro: Glandularia catharinae, also known as the Purple Sage or Cat's Meow, is a flowering plant native to South America that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Glandularia catharinae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal applications.
